meta.title: Diana Furchtgott-Roth on Public Union Employees for Fox Business
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow and Director of the Center for Employment Policy Diana Furchtgott-Roth joined Fox Business on March 24 to discuss public union employees in regard to the control tower engineer falling asleep on the job at Reagan National Airport.
